proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_enzalutamide` have a higher probability of `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_enzalutamide`, after adjustment for age, ECOG performance status, mCRPC status, visceral metastases, log PSA, BRCA2 mutation, AR-V7 positivity, MSI-high status, PSMA-high status, and other treatments.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model; effect is the adjusted risk difference for treatment_enzalutamide.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_enzalutamide` was strongly associated with higher response: adjusted risk difference +0.2023 (SE 0.00374), p<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_abiraterone` have a higher probability of `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_abiraterone`, after the same multivariable adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model; effect is the adjusted risk difference for treatment_abiraterone.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_abiraterone` did not show a higher response probability: adjusted risk difference -0.0045 (SE 0.00390), p=0.246.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_docetaxel` have a higher probability of `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_docetaxel`, after the same multivariable adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model; effect is the adjusted risk difference for treatment_docetaxel.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_docetaxel` was essentially null: adjusted risk difference -0.00002 (SE 0.00389), p=0.995.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_olaparib` have a higher probability of `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_olaparib`, after the same multivariable adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model; effect is the adjusted risk difference for treatment_olaparib.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_olaparib` had a small positive adjusted coefficient that was not significant: adjusted risk difference +0.0037 (SE 0.00592), p=0.535.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_lu177_psma` have a higher probability of `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_lu177_psma`, after the same multivariable adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model; effect is the adjusted risk difference for treatment_lu177_psma.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_lu177_psma` did not show a significant main-effect association: adjusted risk difference +0.0047 (SE 0.00502), p=0.353.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_pembrolizumab` have a higher probability of `objective_response` than patients not receiving `treatment_pembrolizumab`, after the same multivariable adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model; effect is the adjusted risk difference for treatment_pembrolizumab.
analyses.result_summary: `treatment_pembrolizumab` had no detectable main-effect association: adjusted risk difference -0.0005 (SE 0.00834), p=0.955.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `mcrpc` equal to 1 have a lower probability of `objective_response` than patients with `mcrpc` equal to 0, after adjustment for age, ECOG performance status, visceral metastases, log PSA, key biomarkers, and treatments.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model; effect is the adjusted risk difference for mcrpc.
analyses.result_summary: `mcrpc` was a strong negative prognostic feature: adjusted risk difference -0.1768 (SE 0.00437), p<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `ecog_ps` of 2 have a lower probability of `objective_response` than patients with `ecog_ps` below 2.

analyses.method: Two-proportion z test comparing objective_response for ecog_ps >= 2 versus ecog_ps < 2.
analyses.result_summary: Response was 0.182 for `ecog_ps` >=2 versus 0.250 for `ecog_ps` <2, a risk difference of -0.0690, p<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `psa_ng_ml` at least 50 have a lower probability of `objective_response` than patients with `psa_ng_ml` below 50.

analyses.method: Two-proportion z test comparing objective_response for psa_ng_ml >= 50 versus < 50.
analyses.result_summary: Response was 0.151 for `psa_ng_ml` >=50 versus 0.264 below 50, a risk difference of -0.1135, p<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `brca2_mutation` equal to 1 have a lower probability of `objective_response` than patients without `brca2_mutation`, after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model; effect is the adjusted risk difference for brca2_mutation.
analyses.result_summary: `brca2_mutation` was associated with lower response after adjustment: adjusted risk difference -0.1024 (SE 0.00574), p<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `ar_v7_positive` equal to 1 have a lower probability of `objective_response` than patients without `ar_v7_positive`, after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model; effect is the adjusted risk difference for ar_v7_positive.
analyses.result_summary: `ar_v7_positive` was associated with lower response after adjustment: adjusted risk difference -0.1002 (SE 0.00437), p<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `msi_high` equal to 1 have a lower probability of `objective_response` than patients without `msi_high`, after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model; effect is the adjusted risk difference for msi_high.
analyses.result_summary: `msi_high` was associated with lower response after adjustment: adjusted risk difference -0.0633 (SE 0.01052), p=1.76e-9.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `psma_high` equal to 1 have a higher probability of `objective_response` than patients without `psma_high`, after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.method: Adjusted linear probability model; effect is the adjusted risk difference for psma_high.
analyses.result_summary: `psma_high` was not associated with higher response; the adjusted effect was slightly negative and not significant: -0.0048 (SE 0.00365), p=0.193.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `albumin_g_dl` below 3.5 have a lower probability of `objective_response` than patients with `albumin_g_dl` at least 3.5.

analyses.method: Two-proportion z test comparing objective_response for albumin_g_dl < 3.5 versus >= 3.5.
analyses.result_summary: Response was 0.227 for `albumin_g_dl` <3.5 versus 0.245 otherwise, a risk difference of -0.0178, p=5.08e-5.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `weight_loss_pct_6mo` at least 10 have a lower probability of `objective_response` than patients with less weight loss.

analyses.method: Two-proportion z test comparing objective_response for weight_loss_pct_6mo >= 10 versus < 10.
analyses.result_summary: Response was 0.192 for `weight_loss_pct_6mo` >=10 versus 0.245 below 10, a risk difference of -0.0521, p=6.66e-16.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `crp_mg_l` at least 10 have a lower probability of `objective_response` than patients with `crp_mg_l` below 10.

analyses.method: Two-proportion z test comparing objective_response for crp_mg_l >= 10 versus < 10.
analyses.result_summary: Response was 0.218 for `crp_mg_l` >=10 versus 0.244 below 10, a risk difference of -0.0259, p=3.74e-7.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_enzalutamide` and `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `mcrpc` equal to 1 than in patients with `mcrpc` equal to 0.

analyses.method: Difference-in-differences of treatment response-rate differences, confirmed by adjusted interaction model.
analyses.result_summary: The enzalutamide response difference was +0.0077 within `mcrpc`=1 but +0.4403 within `mcrpc`=0; difference-in-differences -0.4326, p<1e-300. The adjusted interaction coefficient was -0.4307.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_enzalutamide` and `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `ar_v7_positive` equal to 1 than in patients with `ar_v7_positive` equal to 0.

analyses.method: Difference-in-differences of treatment response-rate differences, with adjusted interaction model as sensitivity analysis.
analyses.result_summary: The enzalutamide response difference was +0.0085 in `ar_v7_positive`=1 versus +0.2510 in `ar_v7_positive`=0; difference-in-differences -0.2425, p<1e-300. The adjusted interaction coefficient was -0.2415.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_enzalutamide` and `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `brca2_mutation` equal to 1 than in patients without `brca2_mutation`.

analyses.method: Difference-in-differences of treatment response-rate differences, with adjusted interaction model as sensitivity analysis.
analyses.result_summary: The enzalutamide response difference was +0.0063 in `brca2_mutation`=1 versus +0.2246 in `brca2_mutation`=0; difference-in-differences -0.2183, p<1e-300. The adjusted interaction coefficient was -0.2157.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_enzalutamide` and `objective_response` is smaller in patients with `msi_high` equal to 1 than in patients without `msi_high`.

analyses.method: Difference-in-differences of treatment response-rate differences, with adjusted interaction model as sensitivity analysis.
analyses.result_summary: The enzalutamide response difference was -0.0221 in `msi_high`=1 versus +0.2092 in `msi_high`=0; difference-in-differences -0.2312, p<1e-300. The adjusted interaction coefficient was -0.2290.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_olaparib` and `objective_response` is more positive in patients with `brca2_mutation` equal to 1 than in patients without `brca2_mutation`.

analyses.method: Difference-in-differences of treatment response-rate differences; adjusted interaction model used as sensitivity analysis.
analyses.result_summary: The observed pattern was opposite the hypothesis: olaparib response difference was -0.0321 in `brca2_mutation`=1 versus +0.0031 in `brca2_mutation`=0; difference-in-differences -0.0352, p=0.034. The adjusted interaction was also negative (-0.0345) and borderline (p=0.0526).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_lu177_psma` and `objective_response` is more positive in patients with `psma_high` equal to 1 than in patients without `psma_high`.

analyses.method: Difference-in-differences of treatment response-rate differences; adjusted interaction model used as sensitivity analysis.
analyses.result_summary: There was no PSMA-high enrichment of Lu177 benefit: treatment difference -0.0011 in `psma_high`=1 versus +0.0089 in `psma_high`=0; difference-in-differences -0.0100, p=0.362. Adjusted interaction -0.0088, p=0.389.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and `objective_response` is more positive in patients with `msi_high` equal to 1 than in patients without `msi_high`.

analyses.method: Difference-in-differences of treatment response-rate differences; adjusted interaction model used as sensitivity analysis.
analyses.result_summary: There was no MSI-high enrichment of pembrolizumab response: treatment difference +0.0012 in `msi_high`=1 versus -0.0015 in `msi_high`=0; difference-in-differences +0.0028, p=0.951. Adjusted interaction -0.0195, p=0.673.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_pembrolizumab` and `objective_response` is more positive in patients with `her2_amplification` equal to 1 than in patients without `her2_amplification`.

analyses.method: Exploratory difference-in-differences of treatment response-rate differences, with adjusted interaction model as sensitivity analysis.
analyses.result_summary: An exploratory non-canonical interaction was observed: pembrolizumab response difference +0.1605 in `her2_amplification`=1 versus -0.0072 in `her2_amplification`=0; difference-in-differences +0.1676, p=0.00273. Adjusted interaction +0.1269, p=0.0162.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_lu177_psma` and `objective_response` is less positive in patients with `visceral_mets` equal to 1 than in patients without `visceral_mets`.

analyses.method: Difference-in-differences of treatment response-rate differences.
analyses.result_summary: Lu177 treatment difference was -0.0243 in `visceral_mets`=1 versus +0.0099 in `visceral_mets`=0; difference-in-differences -0.0342, p=0.00865.
